description: Replays inbox-agent incidents through the LIVE classifier weekly, then derives the would-be auto-action (classifier category + shouldSkipAutoAction guard) WITHOUT executing it. Jest unit tests (email-operational-sender-guard.test.js) lock the deterministic guard; this corpus catches classifier drift that changes which actions fire. All emails are synthetic — no real customer data.

cases.incident: 2026-05-25 through 06-11: the agent classified Waves' own newsletter sends as marketing_newsletter, archived them AND fired the RFC 8058 one-click unsubscribe — silently enrolling contact@ in SendGrid suppression group 28768 (root cause of every "test email vanished" report; fixed in PR #1654). Whatever the model calls this email, NO auto-action branch may fire: drift to lead_inquiry/complaint/vendor_invoice would still auto-create a lead, page an admin, or run invoice processing on our own send (expect tightened from destructive-only to branch_any=none in PR #1662 review).

email.subject: Fresh This Week: Venice Night Market, free outdoor movie at Payne Park 🌊
email.body_text:
Hey neighbor — here's what's actually worth leaving the house for this week.

THU: Venice Night Market, downtown Venice, 5-9 PM. Free entry.
FRI: Movie in the Park at Payne Park, Sarasota — bring a blanket, starts at dusk.
SAT: Farmers market on Main St, Bradenton, 8 AM-1 PM.

Pro tip: the night market parking fills by 5:30. Park at the library garage.

— The Waves Pest Control Team

You're receiving this because you subscribed at wavespestcontrol.com. Unsubscribe: https://u31425306.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=example

cases.incident: Counterpart to the contact@ incident: a genuine external marketing newsletter must still classify as marketing_newsletter/spam so the archive auto-action fires. If this fails, the inbox stops cleaning itself and Virginia wades through promo mail again.

email.subject: 48 HOURS ONLY ⏰ 25% off all patio furniture + free shipping
email.body_text:
Summer savings event! Take 25% off every patio set, grill, and outdoor accessory. Use code SUNNY25 at checkout. Plus: spend $200, get a $30 reward. Shop now before these deals melt away!

No longer want these emails? Unsubscribe here: https://mail.shopsavvy-deals.com/unsub/abc123

cases.incident: Highest-cost drift direction: a missed lead_inquiry means no auto-created lead and no admin notification. Synthetic but unambiguous quote request.

email.subject: Quote for pest control in Venice?
email.body_text: Hi, we just moved to 1234 Example Ave in Venice and we're seeing small ants in the kitchen every morning, mostly around the sink. Could you give me a quote for regular pest control service? It's a 3 bed / 2 bath single-story house. You can call or text me at (941) 555-0142. Thanks! — Maria

cases.incident: Complaint drift means no star, no urgent notification, and a frustrated customer waiting silently. Synthetic but unambiguous.

email.subject: Still seeing roaches after last week's service
email.body_text: I'm honestly pretty disappointed. Your tech came out last Tuesday for our quarterly service and I'm still finding roaches in the garage and now two in the kitchen. This is the second time this has happened after a treatment. I'm paying for a service that doesn't seem to be working. I need someone to come back out this week and make this right, or we're going to look at other companies.

cases.incident: vendor_invoice drift breaks the invoice-processor handoff (auto-filing and amount extraction). Synthetic vendor and amounts.

email.subject: Invoice INV-20488 for Waves Pest Control — due 07/01
email.body_text:
Dear Customer,

Please find attached invoice INV-20488 dated 06/10/2026 in the amount of $1,284.50 for your recent order (PO #WV-2231): 2x Termidor SC 20oz, 1 case Advion roach gel, 4x backpack sprayer filters.

Payment terms: Net 21. Amount due: $1,284.50 by 07/01/2026.

Thank you for your business,
SWFL Chem Supply Accounts Receivable

cases.incident: The classifier prompt names SEO/link-building pitches as spam. If this drifts to "other", junk accumulates unblocked in the shared inbox.

email.subject: Quick question about wavespestcontrol.com
email.body_text:
Hi there,

I was checking out wavespestcontrol.com and noticed you're not ranking on page 1 for several high-value pest control keywords in your area. My agency specializes in getting local service businesses to the top of Google with our proven 90-day link building system. We have case studies showing 300% traffic increases.

Do you have 15 minutes this week for a quick call? Just reply "interested" and I'll send over some times.

Best,
Tyler
RankBooster Pro — SEO That Works
